app.name: CC Traffic Light
tray.notification.codex_trust: ChatGPT hooks are configured but have not been verified. Run /hooks in your ChatGPT terminal and trust the commands.
tray.notification.codex_not_installed: ChatGPT hooks are not installed. Open Settings and redeploy ChatGPT hooks.
tray.notification.codex_needs_reinstall: ChatGPT hooks point to a missing file. Open Settings and reinstall monitoring.
tray.notification.codex_error: ChatGPT hook configuration or shared state is damaged. Open Settings for diagnostics.
tray.notification.claude_process_only: Claude Code is currently monitored by process detection only; task state cannot be determined.
tray.notification.claude_unverified: Claude Code hooks are configured but have not been verified. Open Settings for diagnostics.
tray.notification.claude_not_installed: Claude Code hooks are not installed; process-only monitoring remains enabled.
tray.notification.claude_needs_reinstall: Claude Code hooks point to a missing file. Open Settings and reinstall monitoring.
tray.notification.claude_error: Claude Code hook configuration or shared state is damaged. Open Settings for diagnostics.
tray.notification.all_ready: ChatGPT and Claude Code hooks are verified and ready.
tray.notification.settings_fallback: The Tauri settings window is unavailable; the native Win32 settings window is being used.
settings.page_subtitle: Win32 runtime stays native. Tauri owns the primary settings surface.
settings.monitoring_hint: Choose which local sources contribute to the traffic-light status. Disabled sources stay visible as not connected.
settings.appearance_hint: These settings only change the local display layer. External tools and hook payloads remain untouched.
settings.diagnostics_hint: Read-only detector evidence with manual refresh.
settings.about_description: Desktop utility built around a native Win32 host with a standalone Tauri settings shell. The widget and tray stay native; this surface is the settings UI.
